message:
feat(fp-frame): add str.contains case/na/regex option parity (frankenpandas-5xq7)

Adds StrAccessor::contains_with_options matching the full pandas 2.2
Series.str.contains(pat, case, na, regex) signature. When regex=false
the pattern is treated as a literal substring (case-folded via
to_lowercase on both sides when case=false). When regex=true, case=false
is wired through as a (?i) inline flag. Null handling reuses the
str_boolean_with_na helper introduced alongside startswith_with_na.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
